🛡️ Book of Secret Knowledge

Curated by Hersa — Cyber Intelligence Analyst

Hi! I'm Hersa, a cyber intelligence analyst who put this tool together as a simpler, faster way to browse and reference the security tools I use every day. This app aggregates resources from several well-known open-source collections into one searchable interface.

The tool currently indexes 1,657 tools, resources and references across CLI, networking, penetration testing, OSINT, cryptography, AI security, and more.

⚠️ Disclaimer
I do not own any of the tools or resources listed here. All tools, projects, and references remain the intellectual property of their respective authors and maintainers. This is simply a convenient interface for discovering and accessing publicly available security resources.

If you are a tool author and have concerns about your project's inclusion, please reach out directly — I will address it promptly.

Built for personal use and shared with the community. Use all tools responsibly and only on systems you have explicit permission to test.

@hersaintel @ers49
